title: Trespass
content:
I would imagine
    the eyelids fail,
    fall closed, shut,
    as icicles sit
    on porch doors
    where old nails rust.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Trespass"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
